visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic water bottle with a blue cap, located behind other objects.
A yellow lemon in the foreground, blocking the cans and bottle.
A red Coca-Cola can located in front of the water bottle.
A green Sprite can located to the left and in front of the water bottle.
The wooden table surface on which the objects are placed.

action_plan.explanation: The yellow lemon is the closest object and blocks the path to all other items. It must be removed first.
The red soda can is directly in front of the water bottle and must be removed to clear the grasp path.
The green soda can is also blocking access to the water bottle and must be cleared.
All obstructions are now clear, and the robot can safely pick the water bottle to fulfill the request.
